title: Challenging the Astral mass analyzer – up to 5300 proteins per single-cell at unseen quantitative accuracy to study cellular heterogeneity
description: Single-cell proteomics dataset using Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer to quantify up to 5,300 proteins per single cell with high accuracy. This dataset contains HeLa and C. elegans samples.

publication.title: Challenging the Astral mass analyzer to quantify up to 5,300 proteins per single cell at unseen accuracy to uncover cellular heterogeneity

notes: Downloaded from PRIDE archive. Main file: JB_HeLa_10ng_Celegans_noMBR_Report_Peptides_JB_Pivot_.tsv. Same paper as PXD064564.
